meta.disclaimer: Card benefits, earn rates, and annual fees are subject to change by issuers. Always verify current terms at the issuer's website before making financial decisions. SwipeRight is not a financial advisor.

cards.name: Amex Platinum
cards.tip: 5x on flights booked directly & Amex Travel (up to $500K/yr). $200 airline fee credit, $200 Uber Cash, $200 hotel credit, $189 CLEAR Plus, $100 Saks, $300 Equinox, $300 Resy dining. Centurion Lounge + Priority Pass. Fee raised to $895 in Jan 2026 refresh.

cards.name: Amex Gold
cards.tip: 4x at restaurants worldwide (up to $50K/yr, then 1x) & U.S. supermarkets (up to $25K/yr). 3x flights. $120 dining credit (Grubhub, Cheesecake Factory, Five Guys, Buffalo Wild Wings). $120 Uber Cash. Hertz Five Star status. AF raised from $250 to $325 in Oct 2024.

cards.name: Amex Green
cards.tip: 3x on travel, transit & restaurants. $189 CLEAR Plus credit + $100 LoungeBuddy. Good mid-tier travel card.

cards.name: Amex Blue Cash Everyday
cards.tip: 3% at U.S. supermarkets, gas stations, and online retail (each up to $6K/yr). No annual fee. $84 Disney Bundle credit.

cards.name: Amex Blue Cash Preferred
cards.tip: 6% at U.S. supermarkets (up to $6K/yr), 6% on select streaming services, 3% gas & transit, 1% elsewhere. Best grocery card in the market.

cards.name: Delta Blue Amex
cards.tip: 2x Delta purchases & restaurants, 2x U.S. supermarkets. First checked bag free. No annual fee Delta card.

cards.name: Delta Gold Amex
cards.tip: 2x Delta purchases & restaurants, 2x U.S. supermarkets. First checked bag free. Good entry Delta card.

cards.name: Delta Platinum Amex
cards.tip: 3x Delta, 2x restaurants & U.S. supermarkets. Companion certificate annually, MQD boost.

cards.name: Delta Reserve Amex
cards.tip: 3x Delta miles. Delta Sky Club access (10 visits/yr when flying Delta), companion certificate, Medallion status boost.

cards.name: Amex Hilton Honors
cards.tip: 7x at Hilton, 5x restaurants, U.S. supermarkets & gas. No annual fee Hilton co-brand.

cards.name: Amex Hilton Surpass
cards.tip: 12x at Hilton, 6x restaurants, U.S. supermarkets & gas. Free weekend night annually, Priority Pass (10 visits/yr).

cards.name: Amex Hilton Aspire
cards.tip: 14x at Hilton. Automatic Hilton Diamond status. $400 resort credit, $200 airline fee credit, free weekend night certificate. Best hotel card for Hilton loyalists.

cards.name: Amex Marriott Bonvoy
cards.tip: 6x at Marriott, 4x restaurants & U.S. supermarkets, 2x elsewhere. Free night certificate annually (up to 35K pts).

cards.name: Amex Business Gold
cards.tip: 4x on the two categories where you spend the most each month (from 6 eligible). Up to $240 in annual credits.

cards.name: Amex Business Platinum
cards.tip: 5x on flights & prepaid hotels via Amex Travel. $400 Dell credit, $360 Indeed credit, lounge access, 35% airline bonus on points redemptions.

cards.name: Amex Blue Business Cash
cards.tip: 2% cash back on all purchases up to $50K/yr, 1% after. No annual fee business card.

cards.name: Amex Blue Business Plus
cards.tip: 2x Membership Rewards on all purchases up to $50K/yr. No annual fee. Best no-fee MR earner for business.

cards.name: Chase Sapphire Reserve
cards.tip: 4x hotels & flights booked direct, 3x dining. $300 travel credit, $500 The Edit hotel credit (2x $250), $300 Sapphire Reserve Exclusive Tables dining credit, Apple TV+/Apple Music complimentary. Lounge access. AF raised from $550 to $795 in June 2025.

cards.name: Chase Sapphire Preferred
cards.tip: 3x dining, 2x travel, 2x streaming, 2x grocery (online). Points worth 1.25¢ via Chase Travel. Best entry travel card. Transfers to Hyatt, United, Southwest.

cards.name: Chase Freedom Unlimited
cards.tip: 1.5% on everything, 3% dining & drugstores, 5% Chase Travel. Best catch-all card. Pairs with Sapphire to unlock transfer partners.

cards.name: Chase Freedom Flex
cards.tip: 5% rotating quarterly categories (up to $1,500/qtr, activation required), 3% dining & drugstores, 1.5% elsewhere. No annual fee.

cards.name: Chase Ink Business Cash
cards.tip: 5% on office supplies & internet/phone/cable (up to $25K/yr), 2% gas & dining, 1% elsewhere. No annual fee business card.

cards.name: Chase Ink Business Preferred
cards.tip: 3x travel, shipping, advertising, internet/phone (up to $150K/yr). Points transfer to Hyatt, United, Marriott, Southwest.

cards.name: Chase Ink Business Unlimited
cards.tip: 1.5% unlimited cash back on all business purchases. Simple flat-rate, no annual fee.

cards.name: United Explorer Card
cards.tip: 2x United, restaurants & hotel stays. First checked bag free. 2 United Club passes annually. 25% back on United in-flight purchases.

cards.name: United Gateway Card
cards.tip: 2x United, restaurants & gas stations. No annual fee United card. Good starter for MileagePlus members.

cards.name: Chase IHG Premier
cards.tip: 26x IHG points at IHG hotels, 5x dining, gas, grocery. Anniversary free night (up to 40K pts). IHG Platinum Elite status.

cards.name: IHG One Rewards Traveler
cards.tip: 3x IHG purchases, 2x restaurants & gas, 1x elsewhere. No annual fee IHG card.

cards.name: Chase Marriott Bonvoy Boundless
cards.tip: 6x at Marriott, 3x gas, dining & grocery. Free night certificate annually (up to 35K pts). Marriott Silver Elite status.

cards.name: Chase World of Hyatt
cards.tip: 4x Hyatt, 2x fitness, dining, airline tickets, local transit. Free night certificate annually (up to Cat 4). Discoverist status.

cards.name: Southwest Rapid Rewards Plus
cards.tip: 2x Southwest purchases. 3,000 anniversary bonus points. Counts toward Companion Pass qualification.

cards.name: Southwest Rapid Rewards Premier
cards.tip: 3x Southwest purchases. 6,000 anniversary bonus points. Better earn for frequent SW flyers.

cards.name: Southwest Priority Card
cards.tip: 3x Southwest purchases. 7,500 anniversary bonus points, $75 annual SW travel credit, 4 upgraded boardings/yr. Best SW card.

cards.name: Amazon Prime Visa
cards.tip: 5% at Amazon.com & Whole Foods (with Prime). 2% restaurants, gas, drugstores. No annual fee (Prime membership required).

cards.name: Citi Custom Cash
cards.tip: 5% on your #1 eligible spend category each month (up to $500/mo, then 1%). Eligible: gas, groceries, dining, streaming, home improvement, drugstores, live entertainment, fitness, Amazon, phone plans.

cards.name: Citi Double Cash
cards.tip: 2% on everything (1% when you buy + 1% when you pay). Best simple flat-rate. Can convert to ThankYou points if you hold Citi Strata Premier.

cards.name: Citi Strata Premier
cards.tip: 3x restaurants, supermarkets, gas stations, air travel & hotels. 1x elsewhere. Transfer to Turkish Miles&Smiles, Avianca, Cathay Pacific and more.

cards.name: Citi Rewards+
cards.tip: 2x at supermarkets & gas (up to $6K/yr). Rounds up to nearest 10 points on every purchase. 10% points back on redemptions (up to 100K pts/yr).

cards.name: Citi Costco Visa
cards.tip: 4% on gas & EV charging (up to $7K/yr, then 1%), 3% restaurants & eligible travel, 2% Costco/Costco.com, 1% elsewhere. Costco membership required.

cards.name: Citi AT&T Points Plus
cards.tip: 3 ThankYou points per $1 on AT&T purchases + bill credit. 2x grocery & gas. Set AT&T autopay here for maximum value.

cards.name: Citi Simplicity
cards.tip: Not a rewards card. Use only for 0% intro APR on balance transfers (21 months, one of the longest offers available). No late fees, no penalty APR.

cards.name: Citi AA Platinum Select
cards.tip: 2x American Airlines miles, restaurants & gas stations. First checked bag free, preferred boarding, 25% in-flight discount.

cards.name: Capital One Venture X
cards.tip: 10x hotels & rental cars via C1 Travel, 5x flights, 2x everywhere. $300 annual C1 Travel credit, 10K anniversary miles ($100 value), Priority Pass (lounge only — guest access removed Feb 2026), Capital One Lounge access.

cards.name: Capital One Venture
cards.tip: 2x miles on all purchases. Transfer to 15+ airline & hotel partners. $100 Global Entry/TSA PreCheck credit every 4 years.

cards.name: Capital One Savor
cards.tip: 4% dining, entertainment & streaming. 3% grocery stores. 1% elsewhere. Excellent dining & entertainment card. No FTF.

cards.name: Capital One SavorOne
cards.tip: 3% dining, entertainment, streaming & grocery. 1% elsewhere. No annual fee version of Savor. No FTF.

cards.name: Capital One QuickSilver
cards.tip: 1.5% cash back on all purchases. No foreign transaction fee. Best use: simple flat-rate for international spending where no FTF matters.

cards.name: Capital One Spark Cash Plus
cards.tip: 2% unlimited cash back on all business purchases. No preset spending limit. Annual fee rebated if you spend $150K+/yr.

cards.name: Capital One Spark Miles
cards.tip: 2x miles on all business purchases. Transfer to 15+ airline partners. $100 Global Entry credit. Simple flat-rate travel card.

cards.name: Capital One Platinum
cards.tip: No rewards — credit building card. Use to establish or rebuild credit. No annual fee. Upgrade path to QuickSilver after 6+ months of on-time payments.

cards.name: Discover IT
cards.tip: 5% on rotating quarterly categories (up to $1,500/qtr, activation required). 1% everywhere else. Cashback Match™ doubles all earnings year 1 — effectively 10%/2%.

cards.name: Discover IT Chrome
cards.tip: 2% at gas stations & restaurants (combined up to $1,000/qtr). 1% elsewhere. Cashback Match year 1. Good simple card for gas & dining.

cards.name: Discover IT Miles
cards.tip: 1.5x miles on all purchases, doubled first year (= 3x). No blackout dates, redeem against any travel purchase. No annual fee, no FTF.

cards.name: Discover IT Student
cards.tip: Same 5% rotating categories as IT. Cashback Match year 1. Good credit-building starter card for students.

cards.name: BofA Customized Cash
cards.tip: 3% on chosen category (gas, online shopping, dining, travel, drugstores, or home improvement). 2% grocery & wholesale. Preferred Rewards members earn up to 5.25% on chosen category at Platinum Honors tier.

cards.name: BofA Travel Rewards
cards.tip: 1.5x points on all purchases, no FTF. Preferred Rewards Platinum Honors members earn 2.62x on everything. No annual fee.

cards.name: BofA Premium Rewards
cards.tip: 2x travel & dining, 1.5x everything else. $100 airline incidental credit, $100 Global Entry credit. Preferred Rewards bonus stacks on top.

cards.name: Alaska Airlines Visa
cards.tip: 3x Alaska miles on Alaska purchases. Annual companion fare from $122 + taxes. 3,000 bonus miles at renewal. 20% back on in-flight purchases.

cards.name: Wells Fargo Active Cash
cards.tip: Unlimited 2% cash rewards on all purchases, no categories, no caps. Cell phone protection up to $600. Best no-fee flat-rate card — use for everything that doesn't earn 3%+ elsewhere.

cards.name: Wells Fargo Autograph
cards.tip: 3x points on 6 categories: restaurants, travel, gas stations, streaming, transit & phone plans. 1x elsewhere. No annual fee, no FTF. One of the best no-fee multi-category cards available.

cards.name: Wells Fargo Autograph Journey
cards.tip: 5x hotels, 4x airlines, 3x restaurants & grocery. Transfer to 6 airline partners (Avianca, Air France/KLM, British Airways, Iberia, Aer Lingus, Icelandair).

cards.name: Wells Fargo Reflect
cards.tip: 0% intro APR up to 21 months on balance transfers and qualifying purchases. No rewards — use only for interest-free financing. Longest 0% offer currently available.

cards.name: Bilt Rewards
cards.tip: Only card to earn points on rent with no processing fee. 3x travel, 2x dining, 1x rent (up to $50K/yr). Must make 5 transactions/month. Transfer 1:1 to World of Hyatt, United, Alaska, American, Air Canada and more. Rent Day (1st of month) earns 6x/4x/2x.

cards.name: US Bank Cash+
cards.tip: 5% on first $2K/qtr in two chosen 5% categories + 2% on one everyday category. Best 5% categories: home utilities, cell phone providers, TV/streaming, fast food, movie theaters, gyms, furniture stores, sporting goods, department stores. Most underutilized card in any wallet.

cards.name: US Bank Altitude Reserve
cards.tip: 5x prepaid hotels & car rentals via Altitude Rewards Center, 3x mobile wallet & travel (effective 4.5% on Apple Pay). $325 travel/dining credit, TSA PreCheck/Global Entry credit, Priority Pass (12 visits/yr).

cards.name: US Bank Altitude Go
cards.tip: 4x dining, 2x grocery & gas stations, 2x streaming services. $15 annual streaming credit. No annual fee. Strongest no-fee dining card for US Bank customers.

cards.name: US Bank Altitude Connect
cards.tip: 4x travel & gas stations, 2x grocery, dining & streaming. $30 streaming credit, Priority Pass (4 lounge visits/yr), TSA PreCheck/Global Entry credit.

cards.name: US Bank Shield Visa
cards.tip: Rewards on contactless/mobile wallet payments. Verify your specific card's earn rates — terms vary. Good for tap-to-pay heavy users.

cards.name: JetBlue Plus Card
cards.tip: 6x JetBlue purchases, 2x restaurants & grocery. 5,000 bonus points annually at card anniversary. 10% points back on JetBlue redemptions.

cards.name: JetBlue Business Card
cards.tip: 6x JetBlue, 2x restaurants & office supply. 5,000 anniversary bonus points. Good for JetBlue-heavy business travelers.

cards.name: Hawaiian Airlines World Elite MC
cards.tip: 3x Hawaiian Airlines miles, 2x dining. Annual companion discount ($100 off). One-time 50% off companion fare after first purchase.

cards.name: Wyndham Rewards Earner+
cards.tip: 6x Wyndham & gas stations, 4x dining & grocery. 7,500 anniversary bonus points. Automatic Wyndham Gold status.

cards.name: AAdvantage Aviator Red
cards.tip: 2x American Airlines miles on AA purchases, 1x elsewhere. First checked bag free. Companion certificate at $20K annual spend.

cards.name: Frontier Airlines Card
cards.tip: 5x Frontier miles on Frontier purchases, 3x restaurants. $100 off companion airfare at $2,500 annual spend. Good for frequent Frontier flyers.

cards.name: Amazon Store Card
cards.tip: 5% at Amazon.com with Prime OR 0% deferred interest financing (6-24 month promos). Use for large purchases needing financing. Cannot use at physical stores.

cards.name: Sam's Club Mastercard
cards.tip: 5% at Sam's Club fuel centers & gas stations (up to $6K/yr), 3% dining & takeout, 1% Sam's Club purchases. Sam's Club Plus members earn 5% on Sam's Club purchases.

cards.name: Apple Card
cards.tip: 3% Daily Cash at Apple, Uber/Uber Eats, Nike, Walgreens, Panera Bread, T-Mobile, Duane Reade, Exxon/Mobil. 2% via Apple Pay anywhere. 1% physical card. Instant cashback, titanium card.

cards.name: Ashley Store Card
cards.tip: No rewards — use ONLY for 0% deferred interest financing promos (6-60 months) on Ashley purchases. Warning: deferred interest charges full interest if not paid by promo end.

cards.name: PayPal Cashback Mastercard
cards.tip: 3% cash back via PayPal checkout, 1.5% everywhere else. Deposited to your PayPal balance. Best for frequent PayPal users and online shoppers.

cards.name: Venmo Credit Card
cards.tip: 3% on your top eligible spend category, 2% on second category, 1% on rest. Auto-adjusts monthly based on spending. Cash back deposited to Venmo balance. No annual fee.

cards.name: Target RedCard
cards.tip: 5% off all Target in-store & online purchases. Extended returns (30 extra days). Free 2-day shipping on Target.com. Closed loop — use only at Target.

cards.name: Nordstrom Visa Card
cards.tip: 3x Nordy Club points at Nordstrom & Nordstrom Rack, 2x restaurants, 1x everywhere. Nordy Club benefits include alterations, beauty services, and early sale access.

cards.name: Best Buy Visa Card
cards.tip: 5% back in Best Buy rewards, 3% gas & EV charging, 2% dining & grocery, 1% everywhere else. 24-month financing on major purchases.

cards.name: Lowe's Advantage Card
cards.tip: 5% off every Lowe's purchase OR special financing. Closed-loop card for Lowe's regulars. No rewards elsewhere.

cards.name: Home Depot Consumer Card
cards.tip: 0% promotional financing on Home Depot purchases (6-24 months). No rewards — use for large project financing only. Deferred interest applies if not paid in full.

cards.name: Macy's Credit Card
cards.tip: 5% back in Macy's Star Rewards on Macy's purchases. Closed-loop store card. Bonus events for Star Rewards members.

cards.name: TD Double Up Card
cards.tip: 2% cash back on all purchases when redeemed to a TD Bank account. Simple flat-rate for TD Bank customers.

cards.name: TD Cash Credit Card
cards.tip: 3% dining, 2% grocery, 1% everywhere else. No annual fee. Good for TD Bank customers who dine out frequently.

cards.name: PNC Cash Unlimited
cards.tip: 1.75% unlimited cash back on all purchases — higher flat-rate than most no-fee cards. No categories, no caps. Good for PNC customers.

cards.name: DCU Visa Platinum
cards.tip: Not for rewards — use for consistently low APR balance carry. DCU historically offers one of the lowest ongoing APRs available. Keep open for credit history health.

cards.name: Alliant Cashback Visa
cards.tip: 2.5% cash back on all purchases (up to $10K/month spending). Highest flat-rate cash back card on the market. Requires Alliant Credit Union membership (easy to join).

cards.name: PenFed Gold Visa
cards.tip: 5% at gas stations (pump only), 3% at supermarkets, 1% elsewhere. Great no-fee gas card for PenFed Credit Union members.

cards.name: Navy Federal More Rewards
cards.tip: 3x dining, supermarkets, gas & transit purchases. No annual fee, no FTF. Must be Navy Federal CU member (military, DoD, or family of member).

cards.name: Kroger Rewards World MC
cards.tip: 5% fuel points at Kroger-family stores, 2x on all other purchases. Redemptions for fuel savings at Kroger/Shell. Best for Kroger loyalty shoppers.

cards.name: Sam's Club MC
cards.tip: 5% on gas & EV charging (up to $6K/yr, then 1%), 3% dining & travel, 1% everywhere else. Sam's Club Plus members earn 5% cash back on Sam's Club purchases (up to $6K/yr). Requires Sam's Club membership. No annual fee for the card itself.
